ul.li: Memory Safety: SampleSet is allocated on the stack (L1 cache optimal). No heap malloc calls permitted in search hot-path.

Threshold Logic: The 0.5 constant is derived from vdb_constants.h. When selectivity exceeds 50%, the cost of checking bits in a mask is lower than the cache misses incurred traversing HNSW graph nodes that will ultimately be filtered out.
SIMD Optimization: PRE_FILTER path triggers __builtin_prefetch on vector pointers retrieved from the ID bitmap.
